items.briefing:
Australia's cyber framework is undergoing a significant change — the Essential Eight is being retired, meaning organisations should review what replaces it and update their security programmes accordingly. Separately, Australians are among the heaviest AI tool users globally, which increases the importance of using these tools carefully and being aware of data privacy risks.

A new ransomware threat using AI to automate attacks has been identified, and an actively exploited vulnerability in Citrix NetScaler products is under attack — if your organisation uses Citrix, ensure patches are applied immediately.

**Tip:** Ask your IT team whether your Citrix or remote access tools are fully patched and up to date.

featured.title: The Essential Eight is being retired, here's what that means for your cyber programme
featured.quote: Essential Eight retirement forces Australian organisations to fundamentally rethink cybersecurity strategies beyond outdated checklists.
